key_findings.title: /peer-info servlet is completely unauthenticated
key_findings.summary: anonymous GET returns peer_id + quic_endpoint + synergos_version (info-disclosure / version fingerprinting)

key_findings.title: auto_advertise_addr trusts external HTTPS IP echo services
key_findings.summary: ipv6.icanhazip.com / api6.ipify.org / v6.ident.me responses are advertised to peers; DNS hijack of echo path could cause misdirection (TLS verifier still blocks spoof but DoS / op-disruption possible)

key_findings.title: Cloudflare Tunnel UDP-incompat is mitigated by hybrid bootstrap but exposes EC2 real public IPs
key_findings.summary: design surfaces EC2 public IPv6/IPv4 to anyone hitting /peer-info; SG must restrict QUIC port

key_findings.title: IPv4 fallback bootstrap allows repeated QUIC handshake attempts
key_findings.summary: no upper bound on candidates; DNS-injection could amplify handshake CPU usage

key_findings.title: Relay room join is unauthenticated
key_findings.summary: knowing room_id suffices to receive broadcast frames; consider HMAC token

key_findings.title: STUN/TURN client exists but not wired into Conduit
key_findings.summary: DESIGN.md promises mobile NAT traversal; only WSS Relay fallback currently active

key_findings.title: relay_endpoint_configured hardcoded to false in capability detection
key_findings.summary: NetCapabilities does not consider relay config; minor effect on auto_promote heuristic

key_findings.title: CatalogManager state is not persisted
key_findings.summary: root_crc/update_count lives in memory; daemon restart causes one extra catalog sync round

key_findings.title: IPC Subscribe filter granularity is category-only
key_findings.summary: no per-project / per-peer filter; Tauri GUI must filter client-side

next_step: Win -> AWS smoke test (manual), then queue M-01 (TURN/STUN wiring) and M-03 (catalog persistence) issues
